'''√zh-sh-g''' ('''kazhashag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaminate|deaminate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaminate|deaminate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √zh-sh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazhashag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizhashag || jizhashag || shizhashag || kizhashag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzhashag || jujuzhashag || shushuzhashag || kukuzhashag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzhashag || juzhashag || shuzhashag || kuzhashag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzhashag || juzhashag || shuzhashag || kuzhashag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezhashag || jezhashag || shezhashag || kezhashag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozhashag || jojozhashag || shoshozhashag || kokozhashag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozhashag || jozhashag || shozhashag || kozhashag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozhashag || jozhashag || shozhashag || kozhashag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag || zhashag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzhashag || jæzhashag || shæzhashag || kæzhashag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazhashag || jajazhashag || shashazhashag || kakazhashag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazhashag || jazhashag || shazhashag || kazhashag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazhashag || jazhashag || shazhashag || kazhashag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazhashag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazhashag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazhashag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazhashagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazhashagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazhashagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazhashagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazhashagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazhashagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazhashagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazhashagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazhashagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazhashagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazhashagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazhashagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazhashagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazhashagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazhashagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazhashagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazhashagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazhashagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazhashagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazhashagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazhashagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazhashagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazhashagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazhashagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazhashagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazhashagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazhashagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhashagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhashagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhashagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazhashagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhashagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhashagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazhashagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazhashagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazhashagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhashagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhashagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhashagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazhashagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhashagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhashagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazhashagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazhashagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazhashagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazhashagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazhashagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazhashagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazhashagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhashagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhashagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazhashagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazhashagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazhashagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazhashagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazhashagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazhashagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhashagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhashagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhashagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
